title: Mortgage Guarantee Scheme Quarterly Statistics: 19 April 2021 to 30 September 2024
body: "These statistical releases present Official Statistics on the government’s mortgage guarantee scheme. They present statistics on the number of mortgage completions, types and values of properties, borrower incomes and breakdowns by geographical area. The data is provided by National Savings and Investments (NS&I) who administer the scheme on behalf of the Treasury. "
